description_long: This object is an open book with a light brown, slightly textured cover and visible white pages filled with printed text. The book is laid flat, with the pages gently curving upward at the center, suggesting a soft binding. The edges of the pages are neatly aligned, and the text appears to be in a standard serif font, evenly distributed across both visible pages. The cover is plain, lacking any visible illustration or decorative elements, and the spine is not visible from any angle. The book's thickness suggests it is a standard paperback or hardcover, suitable for reading in public spaces like parks or cafes. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible damage or markings.
description: An open book with a plain light brown cover and white pages filled with printed text, lying flat and gently curved at the center. The book is clean, with no visible illustrations or decorations.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the front edge, showing the open pages and the gentle upward curve at the center.
description_view_1: A side view of the book, highlighting the thickness of the cover and the alignment of the pages.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the back edge, similar to the front but with the opposite side of the open pages visible.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite edge, again showing the book's thickness and the neat stack of pages.
